$schema_note: Plugin registry for the Open Screen Deck companion. The app fetches this file (raw GitHub URL by default, configurable in Settings) and installs plugins by downloading each listed file into its plugin folder.

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Live temperature on a key face — Open-Meteo, no API key needed.

plugins.name: Crypto Price
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Live coin prices with 24h trend colors — CoinGecko, no API key needed.

plugins.name: World Clock
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: A ticking clock for any timezone on a key face.

plugins.name: Web Request
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Fire any HTTP request from a key — webhooks, REST APIs, IFTTT, n8n.

plugins.name: Philips Hue
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Toggle Hue lights and rooms from deck keys — talks to your bridge directly.

plugins.name: Soundboard
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Play sounds and stingers from deck keys — press again to stop.

plugins.name: Text Snippets
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Type canned text into whatever app has focus — emails, replies, emotes.

plugins.name: Zoom Control
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Mute, video, and hand-raise for Zoom meetings — works without focusing Zoom.

plugins.name: Screenshot
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Capture the screen, a window, or an area — to clipboard or a folder.

plugins.name: System Actions
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Lock the screen, sleep the displays, empty the trash, toggle dark mode.

plugins.name: Home Assistant
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Fire Home Assistant webhooks from deck keys — pair with webhook-triggered automations.

plugins.name: Pomodoro
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: A pomodoro timer that lives on a deck key — press to start, key face counts down.
